PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?categoryLabel(COUNT(DISTINCT ?laureate) AS ?totalCount)(SUM(IF(?gender = wd:Q6581097 , 1 , 0)) AS ?femaleCount)(ROUND(100 *(?femaleCount / ?totalCount)) AS ?percentage) WHERE {
  ?laureate wdt:P31 wd:Q5 .
  ?laureate wdt:P166 ?award .
  ?award wdt:P31 ?category .
  ?category wdt:P279 wd:Q7191 .
  ?category rdfs:label ?categoryLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?categoryLabel) = 'en')
  .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?laureate wdt:P21 ?gender
  }
}
GROUP BY ?categoryLabel
HAVING(?totalCount > 0)
ORDER BY ?categoryLabel
